channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside 47 greenfield road, 31st March
item.description:
The drains were cleared by gully suckers but the contents have been abandoned .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Greenfield Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous hole, 31st March
item.description:
Entrance to car park. A dangerous hole was covered with a metal plate. The metal plate has moved exposing the hole. Dangerous to pedestrians in the dark. Mend it properly?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Vale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Surface disintegrated, 31st March
item.description:
Cars are having to go into the other lane to avoid this large damaged surface. This presents a danger to cars and cyclists. This all the way up Vicarage Road so this needs to be looked into urgently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing commercial rubbish bags left on pavement outside residential property, 31st March
item.description:
Commercial waste is being dumped on Manor Parade with multiple overflowing rubbish bags. It’s obstructing access and creating a health and environmental concern for residents. Please inspect the site and enforce proper commercial waste storage & collection

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manor Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Litter the rubbish is all over the pavement on Olinda Road just seen a mouse up at the top of the road where people have left food on the pavement., 31st March
item.description:
Excessive Litter the rubbish is all over the pavement on Olinda Road just seen a mouse up at the top of the road where people have left food on the pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Olinda Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven and broken pavement, 31st March
item.description:
Watched highways truck offloading/ loading something at 84 Townley Road whilst parked on the pavement. I witness the whole thing. After the truck last I can see pavement slabs are lifted and some broken. Considering this is a school route urgent repairs needed!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Townley Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on door of Electric Sub Station, 31st March
item.description:
There is graffiti on the doors of the electric sub station. Can we please get this painted over. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 14, 31st March
item.description:
Mattress and bagged waste dumped on pavement. Have been there for 1/2 weeks.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Excessive Litter Culford and Buckingham Roads the gutters and drains fill with leaves, debris and glass leading to blocked drains the streets in these areas are not being swept., 31st March
item.description:
Excessive Litter Culford and Buckingham Roads the gutters and drains fill with leaves, debris and glass leading to blocked drains the streets in these areas are not being swept.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food from 2 caddy bags on road and pavement, 31st March
item.description:
Yesterday watched the streetsweeper cart 5 take a break sitting on wall besde all this food rubbish on pavemt and road. then he got up, took his cart and walked away. The rubbish is still here, just more spread out over road and pavent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Wingmore Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken drain cover, 31st March
item.description:
Reported previously and nothing has been done for nearly a year - very dangerous and the cover has sunken more and the road has got very bad around the cover very dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upton Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole and risen road surface got worse over years, 31st March
item.description:
Big piuece of road risen which has been poorly repaired several times and the repair break safter a few weeks - road neds to be dug up and leveled correctly - Also random concrete showing in areas of road on horley close - needs repairing correctly once an for all as damaged my motorbike tyres on more than one ocassions
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horley Close, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Woburn st and russell sq corner, 31st March
item.description:
Neither of the three pedestrian signals turn green. People cross in front of cars risking their safety.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Russell Square, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car outside property since Jan 26, 31st March
item.description:
Car has been abandoned outside house on the road since Jan 2026. No one has ever been to it and no neighbours on road knows who's it is

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Avenue, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress at edge of pavement in front of 161 Harrow Manorway., 31st March
item.description:
Possible trip hazard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrow Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees lining the path, 31st March
item.description:
Dead branches are falling off, needs cutting back as someone nearly got hit by falling branch

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside acland burghley school by the narrowings, 31st March
item.description:
Potholes becoming bigger deeper and more numerous at this location , unavoidable , damaging our car tyres

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burghley Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus stop glass broken, 31st March
item.description:
The glass of teh bus stop box has been smashed needs clean up and replaced

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Lighting Column Closure Broken, 31st March
item.description:
H787 Lighting Column Closure Panel Is Broken & Wires are exposed. This is a School Route & risk to children if playing on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homefield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping neighbour, 31st March
item.description:
Our neighbour is continually fly-tipping in our front garden. Some of the dumped items include their address - hence why we know it is them. This has been happening for weeks. We would appreciate if this could be enforced.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
